_meta.purpose: Verified, speciality-tagged full product ranges. Supplements supplier-seed.json; never replaces it.
_meta.rule: A supplier listed here uses this range. A supplier not listed here falls back to the seed's curated product list, which is untagged and therefore shows unfiltered.
_meta.seedIsSacred: supplier-seed.json is declared human-owned and never-overwritten by build_supplier_index.py. Nothing here writes to it.
_meta.coverage: 1 of 188 suppliers expanded so far. This is the start of the full sweep Lou asked for, not the end of it.

GBUK Group.domainWarning: gbuk.com is an UNRELATED WordPress placeholder, NOT GBUK. Do not use it.
GBUK Group.source: gbukgroup.com product catalogue (WordPress REST API), verified against NHS Supply Chain public catalogue
GBUK Group.structure: GBUK's own EIGHT website therapy areas, per Lou's decision 20/07/2026
GBUK Group.filingRule: MIRRORS the manufacturer's filing exactly. Lancets stay under Enteral Feeding Devices because that is where GBUK files them, even though they are clinically phlebotomy products -- a rep searching blood collection will NOT find them. Deliberate, decided by Lou 20/07/2026.
GBUK Group.notSold: Verified ABSENT from GBUK's current range: tourniquets, capillary/microcollection. Do not list these. Tourniquets confirmed CURRENTLY not a GBUK product by Lou directly (20/07/2026) — she ran this division. Supersedes the earlier web-research finding, which had this as an open question (GBUK Enteral is a named supplier on the NHSSC 'Blood Draw Tools and Accessories' framework, whose Lot 2 covers tourniquets, which read as ambiguous evidence of a possible off-catalogue product). Confirmed: no such product exists. Framework award ≠ product currently sold — a supplier can be eligible to supply a lot without stocking it.
GBUK Group.tubesNote: GBUK's blood collection TUBE range is described in an accordion on the category page, not as individual product records, so it does not appear as separate rows: no additive, coagulation, serum clot activator, serum gel & clot activator, DNA stabilisation, heparin, glucose, glucose with gel, EDTA, ACD anticoagulant, sedimentation systems, thrombin, thrombin with gel, plus urine collection systems. Latex/phthalate/DEHP free. Historic brand name 'Vacusense+' is UNVERIFIED -- every such URL now 404s.
